data.Modification: Iodoacetamide derivative/Addition of Glycine/Addition of G
Addition of lysine due to transpeptidation/Addition of K
Loss of C-terminal K from Heavy Chain of MAb/Deletion of K
Removal of initiator methionine from protein N-terminus, then acetylation of the new N-terminus

data.mod_name: Addition of lysine due to transpeptidation

project.title: Bottom-up spatial proteomics MALDI MSI
project.projectDescription: New workflow for spatial bottom-up proteomics at single-cell resolution.
project.sampleProcessingProtocol: MALDI MSI, as per manuscript. Briefly: washing and fixation steps, antigen retrival, on-slide digestion of proteins in tissue section with trypsin, matrix application, timsTOF.  LC-MSMS (DDA) - https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/19816929/
project.dataProcessingProtocol: MALDI MSI data was processed in SCiLS, while all exported spectra were processed in mMass. LC-MSMS (DDA) data was processed in ProteomDiscoverer.

references.referenceLine: Grgic A, Cuypers E, Dubois LJ, Ellis SR, Heeren RMA. MALDI MSI Protocol for Spatial Bottom-Up Proteomics at Single-Cell Resolution. J Proteome Res. 2024 23(12):5372-5379
